title: Fishing Trap
description:
🎣 Passive fishing made fun (and lazy)!
Toss a trap in the water, bait it with snacks, and let it reel in the loot while you do literally anything else. A vanilla-friendly mod for chill builders, pro survivalists, and professional slackers alike. 🐟🌊
body:
![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36954a5d725ba715cef6ade8ae6f0629ecabc4ba.jpeg)
---
# 🎣 **Drop it. Bait it. Let the waters do the work.**
---
![Trap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adeca20f86de575b05ccc7eeb4a2d3a722fd9661.jpeg)
## 🌊 Passive Fishing Made Simple
- **Place your trap underwater** – lakes, oceans, rivers, or custom ponds!
- **Feed it bait** – Bread, Berries, Rotten Flesh, and more to keep it running.
- **Wait and collect** – Harvest your effort of **Waiting**.

---
![Bait](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87d2cbf6d470c3567cfc0170d9d64a5f19e43af8.jpeg)
## ✨ Designed for a Survival Feel
🔄 **Works in multiplayer** – everyone can build their own aquatic network  
🧠 **Balanced and fair** – not overpowered, just clever automation  
🐠 **Fits right into the vanilla vibe** – like it was always meant to be  
🔧 **Modular backend** – easy for devs to tweak loot and bait tables  

---

- sweet berries

- beetroot
- melon slice


</details>


## 🐟 **Loot Table**  
<details>
<summary>Click to expand</summary>

### **Fish**

- Cod
- salmon
- tropical fish

### **Treasure**

- Diamond
- Emerald
- Coal
- leather
- Iron Ingot

</details>

---

## 🎇 Created with care by Infvoid
**Fishing Trap** is the perfect companion for **builders, adventurers, and survivalists** alike.  
Bring your waters to life and **let the oceans work for you!** 🐚🌊🐟
